name: Drive Shack
address: 1710 Belvedere Rd, West Palm Beach, FL 33406
about: Drive Shack West Palm Beach is a premier entertainment venue blending high-tech golf with an upscale sports bar atmosphere. Located near Palm Beach International Airport, the facility features climate-controlled hitting bays, a rooftop bar, and a full menu of chef-inspired food and drinks. It offers a social environment suitable for both golfers and non-golfers looking for a night out or a group event. The venue utilizes TrackMan technology for interactive games and golf courses, ensuring a high-quality experience. The space can accommodate large groups, making it a popular choice for corporate events and celebrations.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan simulator technology for accurate ball flight data
High-end food and beverage service with full menu
Climate-controlled bays for comfort in any weather
Rooftop bar and multiple lounge areas for socializing
Interactive games and gamified golf experiences
Event spaces and private areas available for groups
food_and_drink: Full service restaurant and bar offering chef-inspired food, specialty cocktails, and non-alcoholic beverages. Features a rooftop bar and private dining options.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Drive Shack provides club rentals for guests.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not allowed as Drive Shack offers a full menu of food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 45-60 minutes depending on the simulator game mode selected.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers interactive games suitable for all ages.
